MemX — Product Hunt gallery cards (light)

Persona-led gallery at Product Hunt size (1270×760), shown scaled. Apple-caliber light theme — one refined background, single accent, screenshots as the hero. Per-card PNGs in ph_export/.

Card 1 · Hero
MemX
Meet MemX
Your whole life.
One question away.
The AI memory app that saves everything you'd forget — and hands it back the moment you ask.
Card 2 · Story
MemX
Why MemX
Stop texting yourself.
Start remembering.
Your notes, screenshots and voice memos are scattered across a dozen apps. MemX is the one private place that holds it all — and actually finds it when you need it.
Card 3 · One app
MemX
One app for everything
Every kind of memory,
one app.
Notes, documents, photos, and voice — saved, transcribed and organized together. No more app-hopping.
Card 4 · Pointed answers
MemX
Ask, don't dig
Pointed answers.
Not files to scroll.
Ask in plain words and get the exact answer — pulled from what you saved, not a pile of documents to open.
Card 5 · Voice · language
MemX
Voice · any language
Ask out loud,
in any language.
Speak or type — English, Spanish, Hindi, anything. Even with tiny context, MemX understands and answers accurately.
Card 6 · Smart reminders
MemX
Smart reminders
It builds your
to-do list for you.
MemX reads your notes and documents — a prescription, a bill, a message — and turns the deadlines into reminders, automatically.
Card 7 · Privacy
MemX
Private by design
Yours alone.
Encrypted to the core.
Every memory is encrypted end-to-end. Your second brain is for your eyes only.

Done — reminder set for 6:00 PM ✓
how much was the electricity bill?

On WhatsApp
Put your second brain
to work in WhatsApp.

Free to start
Your second brain.
Free to start.
Save anything. Ask everything. MemX remembers so you don't have to.
